step1: Hello Mayor! My name is Dora and I will guide you through your first steps.
step_welcome: Welcome Mayor! Look at this counter at the top.
step_select_road: Let's begin. Select the Road tool in your building bar.
step_build_road: Perfect! Now connect the town hall to the main road.
step_finish: Excellent work, Mayor! You are ready to manage the city.
step_select_zone: Good! Now, let's select the Residential Zoning tool to attract residents.
step_build_zone: Now place some residential zones along the road you just built.
error_road_isolated: Attention Mayor! This road is isolated. You must connect it to the existing main road!
